examples: Like many fugitives, he lived in Argentina unmolested for many years.
Occasionally could be heard the drone of unmolested 'plane.
Occasionally could be heard the drone of an unmolested 'plane.
The scientists at Los Alamos have worked unmolested for decades, comfortably ensconced in the south-western desert.
By this act, he was effectively allowing people to pursue unmolested their own religious practices.
